201.description: User authenticated successfully (JWT stored in cookie)

patch.summary: Update profile visibility for current user
Add or update an anime entry in current user list

delete.summary: Delete an anime entry from current user list by anime id

401.description: Unauthorized (missing/invalid token OR anime not in list)

put.summary: Add anime to favorites by anime id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Anime id to set as favorite

delete.summary: Remove anime from favorites by anime id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Anime id to unset from favorites

404.description: User or anime not found in list

get.summary: Get user public profile by username

200.description: Public or limited profile depending on visibility

404.description: User not found or ghost profile

get.summary: Get favorites of user by username

404.description: User not found or ghost profile
